name: sharker-skills
description: Sharker's curated personal Claude Code skill collection, organized into focused category plugins.

plugins.name: sharker-common
plugins.description: Cross-cutting meta and utility skills. Includes skill-creator, the interactive generator for new skills in this marketplace.

plugins.name: sharker-ios
plugins.description: iOS / Apple platform skills. Includes ios-store-assets for generating App Store submission assets via the codex CLI.

plugins.name: sharker-tool
plugins.description: Standalone utility tool skills. Includes picgo-upload for pushing local images to an image host and returning a URL.

plugins.name: sharker-sdd
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development 流水线 + 自生长工程知识库。sdd-init 一键铺出 .sdd/ 脚手架，按 spec→design→tasks→impl 开发，过程中的决策/踩坑/模式自动沉淀进 knowledge/，下次开工自动召回。
